$schema_note: Source of truth for tier membership: stocks AND etfs, each with tier1/tier2/cut. Skills read/write this file. Stock admission goes through the tradingsh-triage skill; ETF membership is managed by the fee/overlap criteria in docs/tier-framework.md. When this file changes, the cloud routine prompts must be updated too — ticker universes are baked into the prompt text (see prompts/*.md).
